name: test-class-first
stdout:
Step 0 (`test-class-first`) is complete.

**What was done:**
- Created `D:\AI PROJECT\sap-agentic-harness\src\zsah1_workdays.prog.abap` (new `src/` directory) containing, in the required order: `REPORT zsah1_workdays.` → `CLASS lcl_workdays DEFINITION/IMPLEMENTATION` with the exact contract signature (`calc` body is the single intentional stub line `rv_days = -1.`) → `CLASS ltc_workdays DEFINITION FOR TESTING RISK LEVEL HARMLESS DURATION SHORT/IMPLEMENTATION` with 5 test methods (`weekdays_only`, `spans_weekend`, `excludes_holidays`, `same_day`, `inverted_range`), each asserting the fixed expected values (5, 4, 4, 1, 0) via `cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals`.
- Ran the AC command directly: `vsp lint --file src/zsah1_workdays.prog.abap` → `No issues found`, exit 0 (confirmed at both the PowerShell and shell level).
- Self-checked against `domain/abap/CHECKLIST.md`: no `EQ`/`NE`/etc., no line >255 chars, one statement per line, no empty statements, no hardcoded credentials, no `COMMIT WORK` in a loop, `Z` prefix on the report, all `CLASS…ENDCLASS`/`METHOD…ENDMETHOD` blocks balanced (the class the lint can't verify structurally).
- Did not touch SAP connection scripts, did not implement `calc`, did not alter the 5 fixed expected values, did not modify any file outside `src/` and `phases/1-workdays-util/index.json`.
- Updated `D:\AI PROJECT\sap-agentic-harness\phases\1-workdays-util\index.json` step 0 to `"status": "completed"` with `summary` and a `contract` field telling step 1 the exact signature and stub location to fill in (JSON validity confirmed via `node -e "JSON.parse(...)"`).

No commit was made, per the worker rules (harness commits after independent verify).
